# Vendored Front-End Asset Manifest
#
# This file is the authoritative pin for every third-party asset under
# app/static/vendor/.  Bumping a version requires (a) replacing the file,
# (b) recomputing its SHA-384 below, and (c) verifying the page renders
# correctly with the new asset.  See docs/runbook.md "CDN vendor refresh
# procedure" for the full process.
#
# These assets were vendored as part of remediation Commit C-02 (audit
# 2026-04-15) to retire the CDN dependencies named in F-037.  The CSP
# Phase-1 hardening drops external origins from script-src / style-src
# / font-src; with the assets self-hosted, every front-end resource
# ships from this repo.
#
# Format per line: <relative path> | <upstream URL> | <sha384 hex hash>
# Hashes computed via:
#   openssl dgst -sha384 -binary <file> | openssl base64 -A

# ── Bootstrap 5.3.8 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Distribution: https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/getting-started/download/
# License: MIT (https://github.com/twbs/bootstrap/blob/main/LICENSE)
bootstrap/bootstrap.min.css           | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.8/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css           | sha384-sRIl4kxILFvY47J16cr9ZwB07vP4J8+LH7qKQnuqkuIAvNWLzeN8tE5YBujZqJLB
bootstrap/bootstrap.min.css.map       | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.8/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css.map       | sha384-IGzRD4jINKs2iSsOq2MORajTvAmIsb5zZ1DXovbJoJdvmiCcdj9KLJocCj0TS60/
bootstrap/bootstrap.bundle.min.js     | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.8/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js      | sha384-FKyoEForCGlyvwx9Hj09JcYn3nv7wiPVlz7YYwJrWVcXK/BmnVDxM+D2scQbITxI
bootstrap/bootstrap.bundle.min.js.map | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.8/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js.map  | sha384-QB4naBpk637xz9/VYF2efmUFYCi3L/fh1z0dHyy3J2/lh/CQ5Xk7VRdBI59Qbkxv

# ── Bootstrap Icons 1.11.3 ────────────────────────────────────────────
# Distribution: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
# License: MIT (https://github.com/twbs/icons/blob/main/LICENSE)
# The CSS references fonts/bootstrap-icons.woff{,2} via relative URL;
# both font files must travel with the CSS.
bootstrap-icons/bootstrap-icons.min.css      | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css        | sha384-XGjxtQfXaH2tnPFa9x+ruJTuLE3Aa6LhHSWRr1XeTyhezb4abCG4ccI5AkVDxqC+
bootstrap-icons/bootstrap-icons.css          | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.css            | sha384-tViUnnbYAV00FLIhhi3v/dWt3Jxw4gZQcNoSCxCIFNJVCx7/D55/wXsrNIRANwdD
bootstrap-icons/fonts/bootstrap-icons.woff2  | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/fonts/bootstrap-icons.woff2   | sha384-QV+/zNG6sFIQ/qAWRxaR4sjpF37wr046d3pTS5QlogmJfbmyeiWip4YIIGmdK4pa
bootstrap-icons/fonts/bootstrap-icons.woff   | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/fonts/bootstrap-icons.woff    | sha384-jiOBsoZ7OEMAq7BXRR05+D5H/5Lna7TAlXVGHhkfH68p5P1eKJTeI4KCIOfBzG/O

# ── htmx 2.0.4 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Distribution: https://htmx.org/
# License: BSD 2-Clause (https://github.com/bigskysoftware/htmx/blob/master/LICENSE)
htmx/htmx.min.js                       | https://unpkg.com/htmx.org@2.0.4/dist/htmx.min.js                                  | sha384-HGfztofotfshcF7+8n44JQL2oJmowVChPTg48S+jvZoztPfvwD79OC/LTtG6dMp+

# ── Chart.js 4.4.7 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Distribution: https://www.chartjs.org/
# License: MIT (https://github.com/chartjs/Chart.js/blob/master/LICENSE.md)
# Used only on dashboards (analytics, debt_strategy, investment, loan,
# retirement); not required for the core app.
chart-js/chart.umd.min.js              | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.7/dist/chart.umd.min.js                 | sha384-vsrfeLOOY6KuIYKDlmVH5UiBmgIdB1oEf7p01YgWHuqmOHfZr374+odEv96n9tNC

# ── Inter (variable font) + JetBrains Mono ────────────────────────────
# Source: https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2 (latin + latin-ext subsets only)
# Inter:           https://rsms.me/inter/ -- SIL Open Font License 1.1
# JetBrains Mono:  https://www.jetbrains.com/lp/mono/ -- SIL OFL 1.1
# fonts.css is generated by tools/vendor_google_fonts.py from the
# upstream CSS at fetch time; do not hand-edit.  See VERSIONS.txt header
# for the procedure to refresh.
fonts/fonts.css                        | https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap | sha384-fW8fDTSKgwaxXVPTnsFI4TaDS35HzSl/fMP+nlC2+0QpLWEcqMltfZNsfAk6BDHo
fonts/inter-latin.woff2                | (variable font; fetched from gstatic via the Google Fonts CSS)                    | sha384-l0ql7Q1zqvX5klAVRwYjcMVCkCxg5dMTdghsIlC3pYkX6wwEHerh2bP/4yAao3Im
fonts/inter-latin-ext.woff2            | (variable font; fetched from gstatic via the Google Fonts CSS)                    | sha384-r0EoKgCx3XyQjhJdTJ6FDE+8mEZrV95dM7cWvqLDUVdqzM44cq76qdOaYiA3sebS
fonts/jetbrainsmono-latin.woff2        | (variable font; fetched from gstatic via the Google Fonts CSS)                    | sha384-9wWypBPwJyfsOnJFplExHD+Wz+6/I6+rtL7ITgA/6wSPgpj+tnQovOLWM9j2rhOF
fonts/jetbrainsmono-latin-ext.woff2    | (variable font; fetched from gstatic via the Google Fonts CSS)                    | sha384-md7lI+WpzcaSgfuu+hCajR6cBH9KQiGR2BEnokGhah1MOLT+PY8Tb5r5PUYGeiuQ
